title: argyrolobium ascendens
intro: Argyrolobium ascendens is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae, commonly known as the 'tree marigold' due to its bright yellow flowers resembling those of the marigold. The plant is believed to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Argyrolobium ascendens include reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating digestive problems. Argyrolobium ascendens can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
